onboarding.detecting: Taking a quick look at your computer…
onboarding.setupHint: You can change the selected model anytime later in Advanced Mode (gear icon).
onboarding.noModelFound: No suitable model could be found for your computer.

app.title: LLM GUI
app.modelStartFailed: The language model could not be started.
app.applyFailed: The settings could not be applied.

chat.emptyState: Ask me a question to get started.
chat.responseError: The response could not be retrieved. Please try again.

temperature.label: Creativity (temperature)
temperature.tooltip: Higher values make responses more creative and less predictable.

topP.label: Top-P
topP.tooltip: Limits the selection to the most likely words whose combined probability reaches this value.

topK.label: Top-K
topK.tooltip: Limits the selection to the K most likely words at each response step.

repeatPenalty.label: Repeat penalty
repeatPenalty.tooltip: Higher values reduce the likelihood of the model repeating itself.

contextSize.label: Context length (tokens)
contextSize.tooltip: How much text (your messages + responses) the model can remember. Larger values require more memory.

threads.label: CPU threads
threads.tooltip: Number of processor cores used for computation.

gpuLayers.label: GPU layers
gpuLayers.tooltip: How many model layers are offloaded to the graphics card. Higher values are faster but require more VRAM.

cacheTypeK.label: Cache quantization (Key)
cacheTypeK.tooltip: Reduces the memory footprint of the context cache. f16 = full precision, q8_0 = barely noticeable quality loss, q4_0 = noticeable quality loss with significant memory savings.

cacheTypeV.label: Cache quantization (Value)
cacheTypeV.tooltip: Reduces the memory footprint of the context cache. f16 = full precision, q8_0 = barely noticeable quality loss, q4_0 = noticeable quality loss with significant memory savings.

parameters.systemPromptPlaceholder: e.g. "You are a helpful assistant that answers concisely and precisely."

models.ownModelsHint: Load your own GGUF file from your computer. Be sure to follow the license terms of the respective model.
models.curatedModelsHint: Clicking downloads the model (if not already present) and selects it.
models.engineSourceHint: By default, llama-server is loaded from ggml-org/llama.cpp. You can specify a fork here (format: owner/repo).
models.disclaimerConfirm:
Custom model files are not verified by us. Please make sure you know and comply with the license terms of the respective model.

Continue?
models.fileLoadError: The file could not be loaded.
models.downloadError: The model could not be loaded.

logs.hint: Live output of the language model server, useful for troubleshooting.

errors.gpu_out_of_memory: Your graphics card doesn't have enough memory for this model. We're automatically switching to a slower but reliable mode.
errors.model_load_failed: The model file could not be loaded. It may be corrupted or was not downloaded completely.
errors.port_in_use: The selected port is already in use by another program. Please choose a different port in Advanced Mode.
errors.no_cuda_driver: No supported NVIDIA graphics card could be found. We're switching to a mode that works without special graphics card support.
errors.startup_failed_generic: The language model could not be started. We're retrying with adjusted settings.
errors.insufficient_disk_space: There isn't enough free disk space. Please free up some space and try again.
errors.network_error: The download could not be completed. Please check your internet connection and try again.
errors.checksum_mismatch: The downloaded file appears to be corrupted. We're retrying the download.
errors.invalid_file_extension: This file is not a GGUF model file. Please choose a file with the .gguf extension.
errors.file_not_readable: The selected file could not be read.
